question: What was the price range for the Cuisinart Mini-Prep Food Processor on Amazon between 2008 and 2018?
keypoints: The Amazon price of the Cuisinart Mini-Prep Food Processor fluctuated between $40 and $60 from 2008 to 2018.

question: Why did Visionworks inflate the price of the first pair of glasses in their buy-one-get-one-free promotion?
answer: To partly cover the cost of the second pair advertised as free.
keypoints: A legal document states that Visionworks inflated the price of the first pair of glasses to partly cover the cost of the second and purportedly "free" pair of glasses.
